## Design Artifact

Use this template when raising a PR that delivers a design artifact (schematic, layout, BOM, simulation results, etc.).

### Summary

<!-- Describe what this artifact is and what design it belongs to -->

### Artifact type

- [ ] Schematic
- [ ] PCB layout
- [ ] BOM
- [ ] Simulation results
- [ ] Test results
- [ ] Other (describe below)

### Checklist

- [ ] Design review completed (`guidelines/process/design-review-process.md`)
- [ ] All blocking review issues resolved
- [ ] Relevant guideline compliance verified
- [ ] Simulation results attached (if required by `guidelines/simulation/design-verification.md`)
- [ ] FPTCS updated (if applicable)

### Notes

<!-- Any additional context, assumptions, or known issues -->
